content: Pipecat latency pitfalls: sentence aggregator aggregation_timeout=1.0 (introduced v0.0.57) adds ~1s to every response; community sets 0.3. Silero VAD stop_secs default ~0.2-0.5 trades endpoint latency vs false positives. Measured production numbers: ~1.05s total v2v with only ~570ms attributable to service TTFBs; the rest is pipeline overhead (buffers, frame serialization, VAD silence window, network RTTs). Keep inference vendors co-located with the media host region.
